name: 19TH HOLE CLUBHOUSE
address: 11690 E Montview Blvd Suite 120/210, Aurora, CO 80010
about: 19th Hole Clubhouse is an indoor golf venue equipped with four private simulator bays powered by GolfVX technology. The facility offers access to over 300 world-class courses in 4K resolution, with dynamic moving plates in first-floor bays that replicate real course terrain and elevation. Pricing is structured with hourly rates and three membership tiers (Par, Birdie, Eagle) providing monthly play hours and discounts. The venue is located near Central Park, Lowry, and the Anschutz Medical Campus, with easy access via a private parking lot. It is designed for golfers seeking year-round play regardless of weather or time constraints.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced GolfVX simulators with dynamic moving plates for realistic terrain simulation
Over 300 world-class courses available in 4K resolution
Flexible membership options with significant savings on included play hours
Convenient location near Central Park, Lowry, and Anschutz Medical Campus
Private bays for a focused, immersive golfing experience

food_and_drink.notes: No explicit mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not explicitly stated

simulator_hardware.notes: First-floor bays feature dynamic moving swing plates that adjust to replicate course elevation and terrain. Second-floor bays have standard models with high-precision tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly to confirm club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a BYOB policy or food service on-site. It is advisable to contact the venue for specific policies regarding outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole round. Typically, simulator rounds take 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering golf lessons for juniors and a welcoming atmosphere for families.
